div.p: The content of The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN) Digital Quality Measures (dQMs) Content Package implementation guide (IG) defines the standards for reporting the initial population and supplemental data elements needed for calculating metrics for the CDC NHSN dQMs Content Package. This IG does not define how to calculate a specific NHSN dQM or event of interest.
These specifications define the data content requirements for submissions for the CDC NHSN dQMs Content Package to NHSN through NHSNLink.

This IG has the following dependencies:
HL7 FHIR Release 4
US Core 3.1.1
QI Core 4.1.1
Quality Measure IG 3.0.0
Clinical Quality Framework Common FHIR Assets 4.0.1
Data Exchange for Quality Measures (DEQM) 3.1.0
The audience for this work is all developers who want to enable their software systems to report surveillance data to the NHSN via FHIR dQMs.

Lantana Consulting Group produced and developed the content in this IG under contract to the Division of Healthcare Quality Promotion (DHQP) in the National Center for Emerging and Zoonotic Infectious Diseases (NCEZID) at the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC).
